title: crambe maritima
intro: Crambe maritima, also known as sea kale or saltwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The health benefits of Crambe maritima include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. Crambe maritima can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
